In [56]:
import numpy as np 
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt 
import seaborn as sns 
%matplotlib inline
In [57]:
df = pd.read_csv('SuperStoreOrders - SuperStoreOrders.csv')

In [66]:
df['order_date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['order_date'], dayfirst=True)
df['ship_date']  = pd.to_datetime(df['ship_date'],  dayfirst=True)
In [67]:
df['sales'] = df['sales'].astype(str).str.replace(',','').str.strip()
In [68]:
df['sales'] = pd.to_numeric(df['sales'] , errors='coerce')
In [69]:
df['sales'].isna().sum()
Out[69]:
np.int64(5)
In [70]:
df.isna().sum()
Out[70]:
order_id          0
order_date        0
ship_date         0
ship_mode         0
customer_name     0
segment           0
state             0
country           1
market            1
region            2
product_id        0
category          1
sub_category      0
product_name      0
sales             5
quantity          0
discount          0
profit            1
shipping_cost     1
order_priority    1
year              0
dtype: int64
In [71]:
df['country'].mode()[0]
Out[71]:
'United States'
In [78]:
df['country'] = df['country'].fillna(df['country'].mode()[0] )
df['market']  = df['market'].fillna(df['market'].mode()[0] )
df['region']  = df['region'].fillna(df['region'].mode()[0] )
df['category']= df['category'].fillna(df['category'].mode()[0])
df['order_priority'] = df['order_priority'].fillna(df['order_priority'].mode()[0])
In [76]:
df['sales'] = df.groupby('product_name')['sales'].transform(lambda x:x.fillna(x.mean()))
df['profit'] = df.groupby('product_name')['profit'].transform(lambda x:x.fillna(x.mean()))
df['shipping_cost'] = df.groupby('product_name')['shipping_cost'].transform(lambda x:x.fillna(x.mean()))
In [79]:
df.isna().sum()

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(14, 4))

df['sales'].plot(kind='box', ax=axes[0], title='Sales')
df['profit'].plot(kind='box', ax=axes[1], title='Profit')
df['discount'].plot(kind='box', ax=axes[2], title='Discount')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

In [88]:
df['discount'].corr(df['profit']) # العلاقه بين المكسب والخصم عكسيه كل ما الخصم بيزيد المكسب بيزيد ودا بيوضح ليه في مكسب بالسالب
Out[88]:
np.float64(-0.3163652018750581)
In [91]:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))
plt.scatter(df['discount'], df['profit'], alpha=0.2, color='steelblue')
plt.axhline(0, color='red', linestyle='--', label='zero point')
plt.axvline(0.5, color='orange', linestyle='--', label='50% dicount')
plt.xlabel('discount')
plt.ylabel('profit')
plt.title('profit VS discount')
plt.legend()
plt.show()

EDA¶

Profit & Loss¶

What is the total profit by category?¶

In [96]:
df.groupby('category').agg(
    total_gsins = ('profit' , lambda x:x[x>0].sum()),
    total_losses = ('profit' , lambda x:x[x<0].sum()),
    total_Profit = ('profit' , 'sum')
).round(2)
Out[96]:
total_gsins total_losses total_Profit
category
Furniture 656442.78 -369880.07 286562.71
Office Supplies 782455.75 -263981.92 518473.83
Technology 950274.13 -286495.40 663778.73

Which sub-category has the highest profit?¶

In [97]:
df.groupby('sub_category').agg(
    total_gsins = ('profit' , lambda x:x[x>0].sum()),
    total_losses = ('profit' , lambda x:x[x<0].sum()),
    total_Profit = ('profit' , 'sum')
).round(2).head(5)
Out[97]:
total_gsins total_losses total_Profit
sub_category

Art 79614.54 -21660.63 57953.91
Binders 125333.91 -52884.06 72449.85
Bookcases 263151.17 -101446.30 161704.88

What percentage of orders are unprofitable?¶

In [103]:
(df['profit']<0).mean().round(2)*100
Out[103]:
np.float64(24.0)

What is the overall profit margin?¶

In [105]:
((df['profit'].sum() ) / (df['sales'].sum()) *100).round(2)
Out[105]:
np.float64(11.62)

Discount Impact¶

At what discount rate do we start losing money?¶

In [110]:
df.groupby(pd.cut(df['discount'], bins=[0, 0.1, 0.2, 0.3, 0.5, 0.8, 1.0]) ,observed= True)['profit'].mean().round(2)
Out[110]:
discount
(0.0, 0.1]      72.62
(0.1, 0.2]      27.61
(0.2, 0.3]     -21.88
(0.3, 0.5]     -61.55
(0.5, 0.8]     -98.20
(0.8, 1.0]   -1534.33
Name: profit, dtype: float64

How strong is the correlation between discount and profit?¶

In [112]:
df['discount'].corr(df['profit']).round(2)
Out[112]:
np.float64(-0.32)

Which category is most affected by discounts?¶

In [116]:
df.groupby('category')[['discount', 'profit']].corr().unstack()['discount']['profit'].round(2)
Out[116]:
category
Furniture         -0.49
Office Supplies   -0.25
Technology        -0.38
Name: profit, dtype: float64

Operations & Shipping¶

What is the average shipping time per ship mode?¶

In [138]:
df['days_to_ship'] = (df['ship_date'] - df['order_date']).dt.days
In [141]:
df.groupby('ship_mode')['days_to_ship'].mean().sort_values(ascending= False)
Out[141]:
ship_mode
Standard Class   5
Second Class     3
First Class      2
Same Day         0
Name: days_to_ship, dtype: float64

Does order priority actually affect shipping speed?¶

In [142]:
df.groupby('order_priority')['days_to_ship'].mean()
Out[142]:
order_priority
Critical   2
High       3
Low        6
Medium     5
Name: days_to_ship, dtype: float64

What is the average shipping cost per ship mode?¶

In [143]:
df.groupby('ship_mode')['shipping_cost'].mean()
Out[143]:
ship_mode
First Class      41
Same Day         43
Second Class     30
Standard Class   20
Name: shipping_cost, dtype: float64

Does shipping cost negatively impact profit?¶

In [147]:
df['shipping_cost'].corr(df['profit']).round(2) # So shipping cost is not causing the profit to increase 
# large orders naturally come with both higher profit and higher shipping cost together.
Out[147]:
np.float64(0.36)

Data Visu¶

Total Profit by Category¶

In [164]:
profit_cat = df.groupby('category')['profit'].sum().sort_values(ascending=False)
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))
profit_cat.plot(kind='bar', color='teal')
plt.title('Total Profit by Category')
plt.ylabel('Profit')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

Total profit by sub_category¶

In [172]:
sub_cat_profit = df.groupby('sub_category')['profit'].sum().sort_values(ascending= False).nlargest(10)
plt.figure(figsize= (8,5))
sub_cat_profit.plot(kind='barh' , color = 'teal')
plt.title('profit by Sub_category')
plt.ylabel('sub_category')
plt.xlabel('profit')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

Which country has the highest profit?¶

In [174]:
sub_cat_profit = df.groupby('country')['profit'].sum().sort_values(ascending= False).nlargest(10)
plt.figure(figsize= (8,5))
sub_cat_profit.plot(kind='barh' , color = 'teal')
plt.title('profit by country')
plt.ylabel('country')
plt.xlabel('profit')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [176]:
import plotly.express as p
top10_countries = df.groupby('country')['profit'].sum().nlargest(10).reset_index()
top10_countries.columns = ['country', 'profit']

fig = px.choropleth(
    top10_countries,
    locations='country',
    locationmode='country names',
    color='profit',
    title='Top 10 Countries by Profit',
    color_continuous_scale='teal'
)

fig.show()

Gains vs Losses by Category¶

In [182]:
profit_detail = df.groupby('category').agg(
    gains  = ('profit', lambda x: x[x > 0].sum()),
    losses = ('profit', lambda x: x[x < 0].sum())
)
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))
profit_detail.plot(kind='bar', color=['teal', 'red'])
plt.axhline(0, color='black', linestyle='--', linewidth=0.8)
plt.title('Gains vs Losses by Category')
plt.tick_params(axis='x', rotation=15)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

<Figure size 800x500 with 0 Axes>
In [183]:
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))
plt.scatter(df['discount'], df['profit'], alpha=0.2, color='teal')
plt.axhline(0, color='red', linestyle='--', label='zero point')
plt.axvline(0.5, color='orange', linestyle='--', label='50% dicount')
plt.xlabel('discount')
plt.ylabel('profit')
plt.title('profit VS discount')
plt.legend()
plt.show()

Avg Profit by Discount Range¶

In [185]:
disc_bins = df.groupby(
    pd.cut(df['discount'], bins=[0, 0.1, 0.2, 0.3, 0.5, 0.8, 1.0]),
    observed=True
)['profit'].mean()
colors3 = ['red' if x < 0 else 'steelblue' for x in disc_bins]
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))
disc_bins.plot(kind='bar', color=colors3)
plt.axhline(0, color='black', linestyle='--', linewidth=0.8)
plt.title('Avg Profit by Discount Range')
plt.xlabel('Discount Range')
plt.tick_params(axis='x', rotation=30)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

Discount-Profit Correlation by Category¶

In [188]:
corr_cat = df.groupby('category')[['discount', 'profit']].corr().unstack()['discount']['profit']
colors4 = ['red' if x < 0 else 'steelblue' for x in corr_cat]
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))
corr_cat.plot(kind='bar', color=colors4)
plt.axhline(0, color='black', linestyle='--', linewidth=0.8)
plt.title('Discount|Profit Correlation by Category')
plt.tick_params(axis='x', rotation=15)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

Sales Trend by Year¶

In [189]:
sales_year = df.groupby('year')['sales'].sum()
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))
sales_year.plot(kind='line', marker='o', color='teal')
plt.title('Sales Trend by Year')
plt.ylabel('Sales')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

Year-over-Year Sales Growth %¶

In [190]:
growth = df.groupby('year')['sales'].sum().pct_change() * 100
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))
growth.dropna().plot(kind='bar', color='teal')
plt.axhline(0, color='black', linestyle='--', linewidth=0.8)
plt.title('Year-over-Year Sales Growth %')
plt.ylabel('%')
plt.tick_params(axis='x', rotation=0)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

Total Sales by Market¶

In [192]:
market_sales = df.groupby('market')['sales'].sum().sort_values(ascending=False)
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))
market_sales.plot(kind='bar', color='teal')
plt.title('Total Sales by Market')
plt.ylabel('Sales')
plt.tick_params(axis='x', rotation=30)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

Top 10 Countries by Sales¶

In [201]:
top_countries = df.groupby('country')['sales'].sum().nlargest(10)
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))
top_countries.plot(kind='barh', color='teal')
plt.title('Top 10 Countries by Sales')
plt.xlabel('Sales')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

Total profit By Segment¶

In [197]:
segment_profit = df.groupby('segment')['profit'].sum().sort_values(ascending=False)
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))
segment_profit.plot(kind='bar', color='teal')
plt.title('Total Profit by Segment')
plt.ylabel('Profit')
plt.tick_params(axis='x', rotation=45)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

Avg Shipping Time by Ship Mode¶

In [202]:
ship_time = df.groupby('ship_mode')['days_to_ship'].mean().sort_values(ascending=False)
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))
ship_time.plot(kind='bar', color='teal')
plt.title('Avg Shipping Time by Ship Mode')
plt.ylabel('Days')
plt.tick_params(axis='x', rotation=45)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

Avg Shipping Time by Order Priority¶

In [206]:
priority_time = df.groupby('order_priority')['days_to_ship'].mean().sort_values(ascending=False)
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))
priority_time.plot(kind='bar', color='teal')
plt.title('Avg Shipping Time by Order Priority')
plt.ylabel('Days')
plt.tick_params(axis='x', rotation=45)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

Monthly Sales & Profit Trend¶

In [209]:
monthly = df.groupby('month').agg(
    sales  = ('sales', 'sum'),
    profit = ('profit', 'sum')
)

fig, ax1 = plt.subplots(figsize=(12, 5))

ax1.plot(monthly.index, monthly['sales'], 
         marker='o', color='steelblue', label='Sales')
ax1.set_ylabel('Sales', color='steelblue')
ax1.tick_params(axis='y', labelcolor='steelblue')

ax2 = ax1.twinx()
ax2.plot(monthly.index, monthly['profit'], 
         marker='s', color='teal', label='Profit')
ax2.set_ylabel('Profit', color='teal')
ax2.tick_params(axis='y', labelcolor='teal')


ax1.set_xticks(range(1, 13))
ax1.set_xticklabels(['Jan','Feb','Mar','Apr','May','Jun',
                     'Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec'])

lines1, labels1 = ax1.get_legend_handles_labels()
lines2, labels2 = ax2.get_legend_handles_labels()
ax1.legend(lines1 + lines2, labels1 + labels2, loc='upper left')

plt.title('Monthly Sales & Profit Trend')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [ ]:
